name: Column Small Lamp Base Black - Threshold™: Polyresin, No Assembly, UL Listed, Fits Small Lampshades
description: Lamps are an easy way to add character to your home, and the Column Small Lamp Base from Threshold™ is no different. The black table lamp is perfect on top of a dresser or display table because the small size won't get in the way of anything behind it. Pair this column lamp base with a white or gray lampshade to complete this sophisticated look, or add one with fun stripes to make it your own.
